/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libbluez-dbus-cpp.so.0 -o libbluez-dbus-cpp.so.0.0.1 CMakeFiles/bluez-dbus-cpp.dir/src/GattService1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bluez-dbus-cpp.dir/src/GattCharacteristic1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bluez-dbus-cpp.dir/src/GattDescriptor1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bluez-dbus-cpp.dir/src/Util.cpp.o  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libsdbus-c++.so.1.1.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lsodium
